name: core.openwop.workflows.marketing
description: Real-work workflow pack (RFC 0013, ADR 0149) — the Marketing & Advertising cluster: Full Campaign Launch, Ad Performance Optimization Loop, Content Brief Generator, and Content Repurposing. Reasons with core.ai.chatCompletion over real tenant data (feature.crm / feature.kb / feature.cms / feature.email); binds the ad platforms (Google/Meta Ads) via core.openwop.http.openapi-call connectionRef. The optimization loop routes within-guardrail changes to auto-apply and out-of-guardrail changes to a core.chat.approvalGate via a core.flow.if conditional node (ADR 0149 open-question resolution: a flow conditional, not a new primitive). Every launch/publish/apply is approval- or guardrail-gated; all tenant values are run parameters (replay-deterministic). Published under core.openwop.workflows.* (openwop-team key).
author: openwop
